name: Dexus Convenience Retail Reit
analysis: DXC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.6500, stop A$2.5047, target A$3.0859 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
